ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., D for definitive) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the test result, often linked to a dictionary */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test related to this result */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient related to the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., pending, finalized) */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the test result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result */,
  "abnormal_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the result is abnormal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the laboratory test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test (e.g., Mantoux / PPD) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., Immunological, Microbiological) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the test (e.g., Blood, Urine) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the test (e.g., ELISA, PCR) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the test (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dictionaries" (
  "dict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dictionary entry */,
  "dict_entry" TEXT /* The term used in the laboratory context */,
  "local_abbrev" TEXT /* Local abbreviation for the term */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dictionary entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the term (e.g., CDC, WHO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the patient record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the patient record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test order */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who ordered the test */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test order (e.g., urgent, routine) */,
  "reason_for_order" TEXT /* Reason for placing the test order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_orders_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_orders_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_orders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend observed in results (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks regarding the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the analysis */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend, pattern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_analysis_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_analysis_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_analysis_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, doctor, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the audit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test related to the guideline */,
  "guideline" TEXT /* Description of the guideline or standard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reference was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the reference */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the guideline or standard (e.g., CDC, WHO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_references_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_references_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_references_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)
